notes: Batons are legal in some US states but restricted or prohibited in others, particularly for concealed carry.
Restricted venues may still prohibit carry
Self-defence keychains are generally legal in most US states, though certain designs may be restricted.
Carrying a sword in public is legal in some US states but restricted in others, especially in urban areas.
Tasers are legal in most US states but may be restricted by local laws or conditions such as age or criminal history.
Switchblade legality varies widely by state in the US, with some allowing them and others restricting or banning them.
Butterfly knives are legal in some US states but restricted in others depending on local knife laws.
Stun guns are legal in many US states, but some states and cities impose restrictions or require permits.
Brass knuckles are legal in some states but banned or restricted in others across the US.
